title: Anthrax101's Remastered Pitcher Plant
description: The pitcher plant's defining feature is in its pitcher. This pack gives the pitcher plant's pitcher a more recognizable, unique and satisfying look.
body:
The pitcher plant's defining feature is in its pitcher. This pack gives the pitcher plant's pitcher a more recognizable, unique and satisfying look.

Anthrax101's Remastered Pitcher Plant seeks to give a remodel to the pitcher plant that allows it to flourish its most unique feature in a more eye-catching way. I have also remodeled this in the hopes that the pitcher plant's uniqueness will provide extra incentive for the player to seek it out.

## Other Projects
